The '''''Lady Sunfire''''', a modified [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[Barloz-class medium freighter/Legends|''Barloz''-class freighter]], was the personal [[Starship/Legends|ship]] of of the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Clyngunn]] the [[ZeHethbra]]. It was armed with three [[Quad turbolaser cannon/Legends|quad turbolaser cannons]]<ref name="TLCSB" /><ref name="TTS" /><ref name="g4" /> and four aft-firing [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] launchers. However, due to the larger powerplant needed for the Lady Sunfire's weapons, the ship could only carry 70 metric tons of cargo as a result.<ref name="TLCSB" /><ref name="TTS" /> The ''Lady Sunfire'' was configured to operate with a crew consisting only of Clyngunn and his [[R3-series astromech droid/Legends|R3-series astromech droid]], which was programmed to operate silently.<ref name="TLCSB" /><ref name="TTS" />

{{Ship-stub}}
